description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia handbags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. Patent hues are a hot new-season bag trend, and this handbag is a classic example of the style. Carry this ethnically styled piece with the cut-out leaf pattern handle or tuck it under your arm and style it with a striking richly-coloured salwar suit for maximum impact. Accessorise with similar tones.Metallic textured fabric on the upper with rectangular cut-out handlesOne zippered compartment with fabric lining and two zippered pockets insideA zippered pocket on the backBranding appliquéd on the frontBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
